title: Mapping Faultlines: Learning and Reinforcements (Part 2)
content:
By Seerat Jabeen, Rishiti Choudaha, Tanvi Dawrani, Anshima Agarwal  During the week of the India AI Impact Summit in February 2026, scattered pockets within and around the venue of the summit in New Delhi became the sites of sustained, sometimes uncomfortable, and consequential conversation about the future of AI governance. As part of the two-day […]
